---
title: The Impact of Prior Vaccine Type on Subsequent Influenza Vaccine Responses
event: Conference Presentation
location: online 
date: "2026-06-17"
image: featured.png
image-alt: impact of influenza vaccine sequencing
categories:
  - Research
  - Vaccines
  - Influenza
---

<a href="Handel-2026-ACVR.pdf" target="_blank">These are the slides</a> for a presentation given at the 2026 Annual Conference on Vaccinology Research.
